message:
test(fj-conformance): add 20 oracle tests for Concatenate primitive

Comprehensive coverage of lax.concatenate behavior:
- 1D concatenation: two arrays, three arrays, different sizes, single array
- 2D axis 0: varying row counts, same size, default dimension
- 2D axis 1: column concatenation, three arrays
- 3D: all three axis combinations
- Float tensor support
- Edge cases: negative values, empty arrays, large concatenation, single row/col

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
